data.html:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using AttendanceSystem.Hubs;
using AttendanceSystem.Models;
using AttendanceSystem.Repositories;
using Microsoft.AspNet.SignalR;

namespace AttendanceSystem.Services
{
    /// 
    /// Business rules for attendance events.
    /// Handles real-time recording, device sync, and daily summary rollups.
    /// Uses UnitOfWork so cross-repository changes commit atomically.
    /// 
    public interface IAttendanceService
    {
        Task RecordAttendanceAsync(int userId, CheckinStatus status, byte[] capturedImage,
            VerificationType verification = VerificationType.FaceRecognition, int score = 0, string deviceSerial = null);
        Task SyncDeviceRecordsAsync(List records, string deviceSerial);
        Task GetDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(int userId, DateTime date);
        Task> GetRangeAttendanceSummariesAsync(int userId, DateTime start, DateTime end);
        Task> GetUserAttendanceAsync(int userId, DateTime start, DateTime end);
        Task UpdateDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(int userId, DateTime date);
        Task> GetTodayAttendanceAsync();
        Task GetDashboardStatsAsync();
    }

    public class AttendanceService : IAttendanceService
    {
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _uow;
        private readonly IAttendancePolicyService _policy;

        public AttendanceService(IUnitOfWork uow, IAttendancePolicyService policy)
        {
            _uow = uow;
            _policy = policy;
        }

        public async Task RecordAttendanceAsync(int userId, CheckinStatus status,
            byte[] capturedImage, VerificationType verification = VerificationType.FaceRecognition,
            int score = 0, string deviceSerial = null)
        {
            var user = await _uow.Users.GetByIdAsync(userId);
            if (user == null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"User with ID {userId} not found");
            if (user.Status != UserStatus.Active)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"User {user.EmployeeId} is not active");

            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
            var record = new AttendanceRecord
            {
                UserId = userId,
                Timestamp = now,
                Status = status,
                CaptureedImage = capturedImage,
                DeviceSerialNumber = deviceSerial,
                VerificationType = verification,
                VerificationScore = score,
                IsSynced = true,
                SyncedDate = now
            };

            await _uow.AttendanceRecords.AddAsync(record);
            await _uow.SaveChangesAsync();

            // Update daily summary
            await UpdateDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(userId, now.Date);

            // Broadcast to dashboard via SignalR
            var hub = GlobalHost.ConnectionManager.GetHubContext();
            hub?.Clients.All.attendanceRecorded(new
            {
                record.Id,
                record.UserId,
                EmployeeId = user.EmployeeId,
                UserName = user.Name,
                Timestamp = record.Timestamp,
                Status = record.Status.ToString(),
                VerificationType = record.VerificationType.ToString(),
                record.VerificationScore
            });

            return record;
        }

        public async Task SyncDeviceRecordsAsync(List records, string deviceSerial)
        {
            var result = new SyncResult();
            if (records == null || records.Count == 0) return result;

            await _uow.BeginTransactionAsync();
            try
            {
                foreach (var dto in records)
                {
                    // Skip records for unknown users (FK constraint)
                    var user = await _uow.Users.GetByIdAsync(dto.UserId);
                    if (user == null)
                    {
                        result.Skipped++;
                        continue;
                    }

                    // De-duplicate by (userId, timestamp, device)
                    if (await _uow.AttendanceRecords.ExistsAsync(dto.UserId, dto.Timestamp, dto.DeviceSerialNumber ?? deviceSerial))
                    {
                        result.Skipped++;
                        continue;
                    }

                    var record = new AttendanceRecord
                    {
                        UserId = dto.UserId,
                        Timestamp = dto.Timestamp,
                        Status = (CheckinStatus)dto.Status,
                        DeviceSerialNumber = dto.DeviceSerialNumber ?? deviceSerial,
                        VerificationType = (VerificationType)dto.VerificationType,
                        VerificationScore = dto.VerificationScore,
                        CaptureedImage = dto.CapturedImage,
                        IsSynced = true,
                        SyncedDate = DateTime.UtcNow
                    };

                    await _uow.AttendanceRecords.AddAsync(record);
                    result.Inserted++;

                    // Rollup daily summary for each user/date touched
                    await UpdateDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(dto.UserId, dto.Timestamp.Date);
                }

                await _uow.SaveChangesAsync();
                await _uow.CommitAsync();

                // Update device sync timestamp
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceSerial))
                {
                    await _uow.Devices.UpdateSyncStatusAsync(deviceSerial, DeviceStatus.Online);
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                await _uow.RollbackAsync();
                throw;
            }

            // Broadcast new records to dashboard
            if (result.Inserted > 0)
            {
                var hub = GlobalHost.ConnectionManager.GetHubContext();
                hub?.Clients.All.recordsSynced(new { deviceSerial, result.Inserted, result.Skipped });
            }

            return result;
        }

        public async Task GetDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(int userId, DateTime date)
            => await _uow.AttendanceSummaries.GetByUserAndDateAsync(userId, date);

        public async Task> GetRangeAttendanceSummariesAsync(int userId, DateTime start, DateTime end)
            => await _uow.AttendanceSummaries.GetByUserAndDateRangeAsync(userId, start, end);

        public async Task> GetUserAttendanceAsync(int userId, DateTime start, DateTime end)
            => await _uow.AttendanceRecords.GetByUserAndDateRangeAsync(userId, start, end);

        public async Task UpdateDailyAttendanceSummaryAsync(int userId, DateTime date)
        {
            var user = await _uow.Users.GetByIdAsync(userId);
            if (user == null) return false;

            var summary = await _uow.AttendanceSummaries.GetByUserAndDateAsync(userId, date);
            var records = await _uow.AttendanceRecords.GetByUserAndDateRangeAsync(userId,
                date.Date, date.Date.AddDays(1).AddTicks(-1));

            if (records.Count == 0)
            {
                if (summary != null)
                {
                    summary.AttendanceStatus = AttendanceStatus.Absent;
                    summary.UpdatedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }
                await _uow.SaveChangesAsync();
                return true;
            }

            var ordered = records.OrderBy(r => r.Timestamp).ToList();
            var checkInRecord = ordered.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Status == CheckinStatus.CheckIn);
            var checkOutRecord = ordered.LastOrDefault(r => r.Status == CheckinStatus.CheckOut);

            DateTime? checkInTime = checkInRecord?.Timestamp;
            DateTime? checkOutTime = checkOutRecord?.Timestamp;

            var status = _policy.DetermineStatus(date, checkInTime, checkOutTime);
            TimeSpan? workDuration = null;
            if (checkInTime.HasValue && checkOutTime.HasValue)
            {
                workDuration = checkOutTime.Value - checkInTime.Value;
                if (workDuration.Value.TotalSeconds < 0)
                    workDuration = TimeSpan.Zero;
            }

            if (summary == null)
            {
                summary = new AttendanceSummary
                {
                    UserId = userId,
                    Date = date.Date,
                    CheckInTime = checkInTime,
                    CheckOutTime = checkOutTime,
                    WorkDuration = workDuration,
                    AttendanceStatus = status,
                    CreatedDate = DateTime.UtcNow
                };
                await _uow.AttendanceSummaries.AddAsync(summary);
            }
            else
            {
                summary.CheckInTime = checkInTime;
                summary.CheckOutTime = checkOutTime;
                summary.WorkDuration = workDuration;
                summary.AttendanceStatus = status;
                summary.UpdatedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
            }

            await _uow.SaveChangesAsync();
            return true;
        }

        public async Task> GetTodayAttendanceAsync()
        {
            var today = DateTime.UtcNow.Date;
            return await _uow.AttendanceRecords.GetByDateRangeAsync(today, today.AddDays(1).AddTicks(-1));
        }

        public async Task GetDashboardStatsAsync()
        {
            var today = DateTime.UtcNow.Date;
            var activeUsers = await _uow.Users.GetActiveUsersAsync();

            var todayRecords = await _uow.AttendanceRecords.GetByDateRangeAsync(today, today.AddDays(1).AddTicks(-1));
            var todayCheckedInUserIds = todayRecords
                .Where(r => r.Status == CheckinStatus.CheckIn)
                .Select(r => r.UserId)
                .Distinct()
                .ToHashSet();

            var todaySummaries = await _uow.AttendanceSummaries.GetByDateRangeAsync(today, today);

            return new DashboardStatsDto
            {
                TotalActiveUsers = activeUsers.Count,
                CheckedInToday = todayCheckedInUserIds.Count,
                AbsentToday = activeUsers.Count - todayCheckedInUserIds.Count,
                LateToday = todaySummaries.Count(s => s.AttendanceStatus == AttendanceStatus.Late),
                OnLeaveToday = todaySummaries.Count(s => s.AttendanceStatus == AttendanceStatus.OnLeave),
                TotalRecordsToday = todayRecords.Count,
                DevicesOnline = (await _uow.Devices.GetActiveDevicesAsync()).Count
            };
        }
    }

    // ---------- Helper types ----------

    public class SyncRecordInput
    {
        public int UserId { get; set; }
        public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }
        public int Status { get; set; }
        public string DeviceSerialNumber { get; set; }
        public int VerificationType { get; set; }
        public int VerificationScore { get; set; }
        public byte[] CapturedImage { get; set; }
    }

    public class SyncResult
    {
        public int Inserted { get; set; }
        public int Skipped { get; set; }
        public int Total => Inserted + Skipped;
    }

    public class DashboardStatsDto
    {
        public int TotalActiveUsers { get; set; }
        public int CheckedInToday { get; set; }
        public int AbsentToday { get; set; }
        public int LateToday { get; set; }
        public int OnLeaveToday { get; set; }
        public int TotalRecordsToday { get; set; }
        public int DevicesOnline { get; set; }
        public DateTime GeneratedAt { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
    }
}
